requirement_topic.en: IMANOR NM / IEC 62109 Inverter Safety Certification
requirement_topic.zh: IMANOR NM / IEC 62109 逆变器安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: IMANOR NM / IEC 62109 逆變器安全認證

summary.en: IMANOR, Morocco's national standardisation body, adopts IEC standards as Moroccan National Standards (NM). Solar PV inverters are expected to meet IEC 62109-1 (safety for power converters — general requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (safety for PV inverters) as adopted into the NM framework. IMANOR can issue conformity marks or accept third-party test reports from accredited laboratories against these standards. Mandatory conformity may also be required under a Moroccan ministerial arrêté designating electrical equipment for market surveillance.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家标准机构IMANOR将IEC标准采纳为摩洛哥国家标准（NM）。光伏逆变器应符合纳入NM框架的IEC 62109-1（电力变换器安全——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（光伏逆变器安全）。IMANOR可颁发合格标志，或接受认可实验室针对上述标准出具的第三方测试报告。摩洛哥部长令若将电气设备列入市场监管范围，亦可能要求强制合格认证。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家標準機構IMANOR將IEC標準採納為摩洛哥國家標準（NM）。光伏逆變器應符合納入NM框架的IEC 62109-1（電力變換器安全——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（光伏逆變器安全）。IMANOR可頒發合格標誌，或接受認可實驗室針對上述標準出具的第三方測試報告。摩洛哥部長令若將電氣設備列入市場監管範圍，亦可能要求強制合格認證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 as adopted by IMANOR (NM framework)
IEC 62109-2 as adopted by IMANOR (NM framework)
Moroccan ministerial arrêtés on electrical equipment market surveillance

summary.en: China solar PV inverter safety is governed by GB/T 37408 (technical specification for PV inverters) and supplementary NB/T or T/CPIA group standards. GB/T 37408 covers protection and safety functions but is not identical in scope or test methodology to IEC 62109-1/2. A Chinese test report against GB/T 37408 is not directly accepted by IMANOR or a Moroccan project owner without IEC-route evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全以GB/T 37408（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及NB/T或T/CPIA团体标准为依据。GB/T 37408涵盖保护与安全功能，但与IEC 62109-1/2的适用范围和测试方法不完全相同。仅凭GB/T 37408测试报告不能被IMANOR或摩洛哥项目业主直接接受，需提供IEC路径证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全以GB/T 37408（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）及NB/T或T/CPIA團體標準為依據。GB/T 37408涵蓋保護與安全功能，但與IEC 62109-1/2的適用範圍和測試方法不完全相同。僅憑GB/T 37408測試報告不能被IMANOR或摩洛哥項目業主直接接受，需提供IEC路徑證據。

gap.en: Obtain or commission test reports from an accredited laboratory against IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, and prepare a declaration of conformity or IMANOR conformity-mark application for the Morocco market. Chinese GB/T 37408 test data may support a gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route evidence. Confirm with IMANOR or the Moroccan project owner whether an arrêté mandates certification before sale or installation.
gap.zh: 应委托认可实验室出具IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告，并准备符合性声明或IMANOR合格标志申请。中国GB/T 37408测试数据可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路径证据。在销售或安装前，应与IMANOR或摩洛哥项目业主确认是否有部长令要求强制认证。
gap.zht: 應委託認可實驗室出具IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告，並準備符合性聲明或IMANOR合格標誌申請。中國GB/T 37408測試數據可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路徑證據。在銷售或安裝前，應與IMANOR或摩洛哥項目業主確認是否有部長令要求強制認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a ministerial arrêté designates the product; IEC 62109 compliance is the accepted technical route via IMANOR NM adoption; project-owner or lender requirements may make it de facto mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters under Chinese market surveillance; GB/T 37408 is the applicable standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 test evidence is a useful starting point but does not satisfy the IMANOR / IEC 62109 route expected for Morocco. Commission IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 testing from an accredited laboratory before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408测试证据是有用的起点，但不满足摩洛哥预期的IMANOR/IEC 62109路径。出货前应委托认可实验室完成IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408測試證據是有用的起點，但不滿足摩洛哥預期的IMANOR/IEC 62109路徑。出貨前應委託認可實驗室完成IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試。

requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electrical Safety for PV Power Converters in Morocco
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥光伏电力变换器的电磁兼容与电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥光伏電力變換器的電磁兼容與電氣安全

summary.en: Morocco applies IEC-based electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standards through IMANOR NM adoption. Power conversion equipment including PV inverters should meet relevant IEC CISPR conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity requirements. IMANOR NM 03.3 series covers electrical safety for low-voltage equipment including requirements derived from IEC 60364 installation rules. Moroccan projects in public-sector programmes may require CE marking-equivalent documentation as a reference, particularly for EU-funded or IFC / World Bank projects.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过IMANOR NM采标方式执行基于IEC的电磁兼容标准。光伏逆变器等电力转换设备应满足相关IEC CISPR传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度要求。IMANOR NM 03.3系列涵盖低压设备电气安全，包括源自IEC 60364安装规则的要求。公共部门项目（尤其是欧盟或IFC/世界银行资助项目）可能要求提供CE标志等效文件作为参考。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過IMANOR NM採標方式執行基於IEC的電磁兼容標準。光伏逆變器等電力轉換設備應滿足相關IEC CISPR傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度要求。IMANOR NM 03.3系列涵蓋低壓設備電氣安全，包括源自IEC 60364安裝規則的要求。公共部門項目（尤其是歐盟或IFC/世界銀行資助項目）可能要求提供CE標誌等效文件作為參考。

standards_or_laws: IEC CISPR 11 / CISPR 32 as adopted via IMANOR NM
IEC 60364 installation rules as adopted by IMANOR

summary.en: China PV inverters are tested for EMC under GB/T 17626 and GB 4824 series (CISPR 11 equivalents), and electrical safety under GB 4943 and related standards. These Chinese test results give useful technical evidence but are not equivalent to IMANOR NM or IEC CISPR certifications for the Morocco market.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器依据GB/T 17626和GB 4824系列（CISPR 11等效）进行电磁兼容测试，依据GB 4943及相关标准进行电气安全测试。这些中国测试结果具有一定技术参考价值，但不等同于摩洛哥市场的IMANOR NM或IEC CISPR认证。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器依據GB/T 17626和GB 4824系列（CISPR 11等效）進行電磁兼容測試，依據GB 4943及相關標準進行電氣安全測試。這些中國測試結果具有一定技術參考價值，但不等同於摩洛哥市場的IMANOR NM或IEC CISPR認證。

gap.en: Supplement Chinese EMC test evidence with IEC CISPR-route tests from an accredited laboratory if the project owner, lender, or IMANOR conformity review requires it. For EU-funded projects, CE marking under the EU EMC Directive and Low Voltage Directive may be specifically requested.
gap.zh: 如项目业主、贷款方或IMANOR合规审查有要求，应以认可实验室出具的IEC CISPR路径测试补充中国电磁兼容测试证据。欧盟资助项目可能专门要求欧盟电磁兼容指令和低电压指令下的CE标志。
gap.zht: 如項目業主、貸款方或IMANOR合規審查有要求，應以認可實驗室出具的IEC CISPR路徑測試補充中國電磁兼容測試證據。歐盟資助項目可能專門要求歐盟電磁兼容指令和低電壓指令下的CE標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a Moroccan arrêté designates the product for conformity; IEC CISPR / IEC 60364 compliance is the accepted technical route; project or lender requirements may be more specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese CCC or voluntary certification routes; GB 4824 / GB/T 17626 are the applicable EMC standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC test reports are technically comparable but not directly accepted as IMANOR NM conformity evidence. Obtain IEC CISPR-route test evidence from an accredited laboratory if the project or procurement requires it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电磁兼容测试报告在技术上具有参考价值，但不能直接作为IMANOR NM合格证据接受。如项目或采购有要求，应从认可实验室获取IEC CISPR路径测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電磁兼容測試報告在技術上具有參考價值，但不能直接作為IMANOR NM合格證據接受。如項目或採購有要求，應從認可實驗室獲取IEC CISPR路徑測試證據。
